info.title: Habitica API
info.description: Habitica is a gamified task management app. The API provides endpoints for managing user profiles, tasks (habits, dailies, todos, rewards), challenges, groups, chat, quests, shops, tags, notifications, webhooks, and more.

post.summary: Use Orb of Rebirth on user
Create a new task for the user
Move a task to a new position
Add a checklist item to a task
Add a tag to a task

delete.summary: Remove a tag from a task

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Comma-separated: party, guilds, privateGuilds, publicGuilds, tavern

get.summary: Get chat messages from a group

post.summary: Post a chat message to a group

get.summary: Get available items for the market
Get available items for the quests shop
Get all available game content objects
